시편 103:1.content: Praise Yahweh, my soul! All that is within me, praise his holy name!

시편 103:2.content: Praise Yahweh, my soul, and don’t forget all his benefits,

시편 103:3.content: who forgives all your sins, who heals all your diseases,

시편 103:4.content: who redeems your life from destruction, who crowns you with loving kindness and tender mercies,

시편 103:5.content: who satisfies your desire with good things, so that your youth is renewed like the eagle’s.

시편 103:6.content: Yahweh executes righteous acts, and justice for all who are oppressed.

시편 103:7.content: He made known his ways to Moses, his deeds to the children of Israel.

시편 103:8.content: Yahweh is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and abundant in loving kindness.

시편 103:9.content: He will not always accuse; neither will he stay angry forever.

시편 103:10.content: He has not dealt with us according to our sins, nor repaid us for our iniquities.

시편 103:11.content: For as the heavens are high above the earth, so great is his loving kindness toward those who fear him.

시편 103:12.content: As far as the east is from the west, so far has he removed our transgressions from us.

시편 103:13.content: Like a father has compassion on his children, so Yahweh has compassion on those who fear him.

시편 103:14.content: For he knows how we are made. He remembers that we are dust.

시편 103:15.content: As for man, his days are like grass. As a flower of the field, so he flourishes.

시편 103:16.content: For the wind passes over it, and it is gone. Its place remembers it no more.

시편 103:17.content: But Yahweh’s loving kindness is from everlasting to everlasting with those who fear him, his righteousness to children’s children,

시편 103:18.content: to those who keep his covenant, to those who remember to obey his precepts.

시편 103:19.content: Yahweh has established his throne in the heavens. His kingdom rules over all.

시편 103:20.content: Praise Yahweh, you angels of his, who are mighty in strength, who fulfill his word, obeying the voice of his word.

시편 103:21.content: Praise Yahweh, all you armies of his, you servants of his, who do his pleasure.

시편 103:22.content: Praise Yahweh, all you works of his, in all places of his dominion. Praise Yahweh, my soul!
